skills.name: Holy Smash
skills.description: Summon Goddess' power and throw a blunt weapon along with the Goddess' power, explodes upon hit and damages nearby enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
Heal Factor: CaptionRatio %
Targets: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Protection of Goddess
skills.description: Give damage and slow down enemy nearby by creating a Protection of Goddess barrier around the character for 3 seconds.(Enemy receives all damage from Protection of Goddess even when leaving the barrier)
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 8 times
Heal Factor CaptionRatio %
Goddess' Retribution Speed Reduction CaptionTime
Target Count CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Sacred
skills.description: Pray to bring Goddess’ help on to the field. Deals nearby enemies while praying and causes an explosion a second later, dealing more damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 8 times
Heal Factor CaptionRatio %
Targets CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Retaliation
skills.description: Ask the Goddess for judgment. Retaliation Strike activates once more additionally when there's an enemy where the light pillar drops down.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
Heal Factor: CaptionRatio %
Targets: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Condemn
skills.description: Smash the ground with a blunt of light leaving a symbol of Goddess' Tree. When the enemy is on the symbol, it gets damages.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 5 times
Heal Factor CaptionRatio % x 5
Targets CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Ring of Light
skills.description: Creates a Ring of Light that spins around the caster, dealing damage to enemies. Ring explodes and damages the enemies nearby.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x maximum 8 times
Healing Factor: CaptionRatio %
Targets: CaptionRatio2

attributes.name: Holy Smash: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill and heal factors of [Holy Smash] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.description:

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Chant: Goddess' Blessing
attributes.description:
* Healing effect is added to the Crusader skill

* Heals the allies around with 100% of Heal factor every 5 seconds

attributes.name: Sacred: Rift
attributes.description: * [Sacred] ignores enemy Defense by 5% per attribute level

attributes.name: Holy Smash: Self Recovery
attributes.description: * [Holy Smash] recovers nearby allies as well when it is used alongside with Goddess' Blessing

attributes.name: Protection of Goddess: Protect
attributes.description: * When [Chant: Goddess' Blessing] is active, allies within the barrier of [Protection of Goddess] take 2% decreased damage per attribute level.

attributes.name: Ring of Light: Self Recovery
attributes.description: * Changes that [Ring of Light] can recover the caster during Goddess' Blessing

attributes.name: [Arts] Protection of Goddess: Dispersion
attributes.description:
* [Protection of Goddess] Skill damage is reduced by 75%, and the number of hits increases by 4 times

* SP consumption increases by 100%

attributes.name: [Arts] Ring of Light: Divine Hammer
attributes.description:
* Summon Hammer that lasts for 20 seconds when using[Ring of Light] (existing function, Goddess' Blessing Healing effect is removed)

* Wander around the character and damage the reached enemy

* Skill can be used when Blunt or Two-handed Blunt is equipped

* Attack type of the skill is changed to [Magic Circle]

* Increases Cooldown by 30 seconds
